caption: A gameplay sequence from a football video game is shown, transitioning from a field view to a play-calling menu. Initially, players in white and black uniforms are positioned on a green field with "COMMANDERS" written in large red letters across the turf. A facecam in the lower right shows a man with blond hair wearing a black shirt. On-screen overlays display game information, including "3rd & 3" and "1st 3:07 32 :06". As the scene shifts, the view changes to a wide shot of a crowded stadium under bright lights. A play-selection menu appears over the field, featuring a "PREVIOUS PLAY" section and a "SELECT A PLAY" interface. The text "COVER 4 QUARTERS" is highlighted in a selection box. Navigation options such as "COACH SUGGESTIONS," "FORMATION," and "CONCEPT" are visible, alongside a button labeled "SAVE ARROW".
